title: mirabilis glandulosa
intro: Mirabilis glandulosa, also known as the globe mallow, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of globe mallow include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Globe mallow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for versatile use in herbal medicine.
